golden_categories.name: Basic URL Validation
golden_categories.description: Covers general URL validation with standard protocols and formats.

golden_categories.name: Localhost and Non-TLD URLs
golden_categories.description: Tests for validating URLs without protocols or with localhost and non-TLD domains.

golden_categories.name: Protocol Handling
golden_categories.description: Tests related to handling protocols, including custom protocols and protocol validation.

golden_categories.name: Underscore Handling
golden_categories.description: Tests for validating URLs with underscores in the hostname.

golden_categories.name: TLD and Trailing Dot Handling
golden_categories.description: Tests for URLs without TLDs and with trailing dots.

golden_categories.name: Protocol Relative URLs
golden_categories.description: Tests for handling protocol-relative URLs and related options.

golden_categories.name: Fragment and Query Component Handling
golden_categories.description: Tests for handling fragments and query components in URLs.

golden_categories.name: Authentication Handling
golden_categories.description: Tests for handling authentication information in URLs.

golden_categories.name: Host Validation
golden_categories.description: Tests for validating hostnames, including whitelists, blacklists, and regular expressions.

golden_categories.name: Security and Vulnerability Handling
golden_categories.description: Tests for handling security-related cases, such as rejecting invalid protocols and parsing differences.

golden_categories.name: Length Validation
golden_categories.description: Tests for validating URL length and configuring maximum allowed length.

generated_categories.name: Default and General Behavior
generated_categories.description: Tests covering the default behavior and general URL validation rules.

generated_categories.name: Protocol Requirements
generated_categories.description: Tests focusing on the presence or absence of protocols in URLs.

generated_categories.name: Top-Level Domain and Hostname Rules
generated_categories.description: Tests related to top-level domain requirements and hostname formatting.

generated_categories.name: Authentication and URL Components
generated_categories.description: Tests targeting authentication components, fragments, and query components in URLs.

golden_to_generated.reason: Both categories focus on general URL validation with standard protocols and formats.
Both categories address URLs without protocols or with localhost and non-TLD domains.
GENC-2 partially overlaps with GC-3 by focusing on protocol requirements but does not cover custom protocols or protocol validation comprehensively.
GENC-3 includes hostname formatting rules, which partially align with underscore handling in GC-4.
GENC-3 explicitly addresses top-level domain requirements and trailing dot handling, matching GC-5.
GENC-2 includes protocol-relative URLs but does not fully address the broader scope of GC-6.
GENC-4 explicitly targets fragments and query components, aligning with GC-7.
GENC-4 covers authentication components but does not fully address all aspects of authentication handling in GC-8.
GENC-3 includes hostname rules but does not fully cover host validation techniques like whitelists and blacklists in GC-9.
No generated category explicitly addresses security-related cases or vulnerability handling.
No generated category explicitly addresses URL length validation or configuration.

generated_to_golden.reason: GENC-1 aligns with GC-1 by focusing on general URL validation rules.
GENC-2 covers protocol requirements and localhost handling, partially aligning with GC-2, GC-3, and GC-6.
GENC-3 addresses hostname rules and top-level domain requirements, partially aligning with GC-4, GC-5, and GC-9.
GENC-4 covers fragments, query components, and authentication handling, partially aligning with GC-7 and GC-8.

missing_golden_categories.reason: No generated categories achieved strong or partial semantic overlap with this fixed golden category.
No generated categories achieved strong or partial semantic overlap with this fixed golden category.
